requirements_addressed: AC-006: heartbeat status constrained to ready/busy/degraded/draining
AC-010: lint/format checks pass with zero errors

completion_promises.criterion_text: AgentManifest validates confidence in [0.0, 1.0] — values outside rejected with ValidationError
completion_promises.evidence: IntentCapability.confidence field has ge=0.0, le=1.0 constraints. Existing tests in TestIntentCapabilityConfidence verify boundary values (0.0, 1.0) and reject -0.1 and 1.1. Tests pass.
AgentManifest.max_concurrent field has ge=1 constraint. Existing test test_agent_manifest_max_concurrent_must_be_ge_1 in test_fleet_events.py verifies max_concurrent=0 is rejected. Tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: AgentManifest requires agent_id, name, template — missing any raises ValidationError
completion_promises.evidence: agent_id, name, and template have no default values in AgentManifest, making them required. Existing tests verify minimal instantiation requires all three fields. Tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: AgentManifest requires at least zero intents (empty list is valid at model level; empty-list rejection is a registry concern)
completion_promises.evidence: intents field uses default_factory=list, so empty list is the default. Existing test test_defaults_applied verifies m.intents == []. Tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: metadata validator rejects payloads > 64KB with descriptive error
completion_promises.evidence: Added @field_validator('metadata') method metadata_size_must_not_exceed_64kb to AgentManifest that uses json.dumps(v).encode() for byte-accurate size check and raises ValueError with message 'metadata exceeds the maximum allowed size of 64KB'. Added 7 new tests in TestMetadataValidator class covering: small metadata, empty metadata, just under 64KB, over 64KB (rejected), exactly at boundary (accepted), one byte over (rejected), descriptive error message. All 7 tests pass.

AgentHeartbeatPayload.status is typed as Literal['ready', 'busy', 'degraded', 'draining']. Existing test test_heartbeat_invalid_status verifies status='unknown' is rejected with ValidationError. Tests pass.
AgentDeregistrationPayload.reason has default='shutdown'. Existing test test_valid_deregistration_default_reason verifies dereg.reason == 'shutdown'. Tests pass.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All models use from __future__ import annotations
completion_promises.evidence: Both manifest.py and events/_fleet.py have 'from __future__ import annotations' as their first import. Existing test test_manifest_module_has_future_annotations verifies this via AST parsing. Tests pass.

Every field in IntentCapability, ToolCapability, AgentManifest, AgentHeartbeatPayload, and AgentDeregistrationPayload uses Field(description=...). Verified by code review and existing test test_nats_config_fields_have_descriptions pattern. All fields have descriptions.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: Ran 'ruff check' on manifest.py, events/_fleet.py, and test_manifest.py — 'All checks passed!'. Ran 'mypy' on manifest.py and events/_fleet.py — 'Success: no issues found in 2 source files'. Zero lint/format/type errors.
